hero.description: I build real software for real users. Mobile apps, full stack web, and applied artificial intelligence.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Real code. Real users.
about.p1: I'm Adrián, a Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer from Castellón, Spain. I started out building mobile apps with Flutter and Java, moved into web development during my internship at a real municipality, and then dove deep into AI and Big Data.
about.p2: I don't stop at tutorials. I build things that actually work and get used by real people: a Discord bot with 1,000+ active users, a multilingual blog in production, a municipal platform deployed for daily use.
about.p3: What drives me is turning complex problems into clean, working software. I'm looking for a team where I can keep building, learning, and shipping.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I built that actually work

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk
contact.description: I'm looking for new opportunities. If you have an interesting project or an offer, reach out.
